revision.text:
{{Japanese Hot Spring | Name = Yoshii Onsen (吉井温泉) | image = Yoshii onsen.JPG | Comment = | Location = {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|ja|福岡県}} {{ill|Ukiha City|ja|うきは市}} | Access = Rail: From the {{ill|Kyūdai Main Line|ja|久大本線}} at {{ill|Chikugo Yoshii Station|ja|筑後吉井駅}}, take a {{ill|taxi|ja|タクシー}} for about 7 minutes. | Spring Quality = {{ill|Simple Hot Springs|lt=Simple Hot Spring|ja|単純温泉}}, {{ill|Bicarbonate and Ferric Hydroxide Hot Spring|ja|炭酸水酸化鉄泉}} | Spring Temperature = 36 – 42°C | Flow Rate = | pH = | Classification of Liquid Nature = | Classification of Osmotic Pressure = | Number of Lodging Facilities = 3 | Total Capacity = | Annual Number of Bathers = | Statistical Year = | External Links = | Special Notes = }}
'''Yoshii Onsen''' (吉井温泉) is a {{ill|hot spring|ja|温泉}} located in {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|ja|福岡県}} {{ill|Ukiha City|ja|うきは市}} (formerly part of {{ill|Chikugo Province|ja|筑後国}}).
== Hot Spring Quality == * {{ill|Bicarbonate and Ferric Hydroxide Hot Spring|ja|炭酸水酸化鉄泉}} * {{ill|Simple Hot Springs|lt=Simple Hot Spring|ja|単純温泉}} ** {{ill|Source Temperature|ja|源泉温度}} 36–42°C
== Hot Spring Town == The hot spring town is located on the left bank of the {{ill|Chikugo River|ja|筑後川}}, where inns and day-use hot spring facilities can be found.<ref name="env">{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.env.go.jp/nature/onsen/area/pdf/hoyo_056.pdf|title=吉井温泉 国民保養温泉地計画書|website={{ill|Ministry of the Environment|ja|環境省}}|accessdate=2024-11-29}}</ref> On the opposite bank of the Chikugo River lies {{ill|Hara-Tsuru Onsen|ja|原鶴温泉}}.
Like Hara-Tsuru Onsen, the hot spring town is also renowned for its specialties in {{ill|cormorant fishing|ja|鵜飼い}} and {{ill|ayu|ja|鮎}} cuisine.
== History == The hot spring was first opened in {{ill|1956|ja|1956}}. It is said to have been discovered through a divine revelation, earning it the alternative name {{ill|Kami no Se Onsen|ja|神の瀬温泉}}.
Twelve years later, on November 19, 1968 (Showa 43), by notification No. 451 issued by the {{ill|Ministry of Health and Welfare|ja|厚生労働省|lt=Ministry of Health and Welfare}}, it was designated as a {{ill|National Public Resort Hot Spring Area|ja|国民保養温泉地}}.
== Access == * Rail: About 7 minutes by {{ill|taxi|ja|タクシー}} from {{ill|Chikugo Yoshii Station|ja|筑後吉井駅}} on the {{ill|Kyūdai Main Line|ja|久大本線}}.

revision.text:
{{Japanese Hot Spring | Name = Yoshii Onsen (吉井温泉) | image = Yoshii onsen.JPG | Comment = | Location = {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|ja|福岡県}} {{ill|Ukiha City|ja|うきは市}} | Access = Rail: From the {{ill|Kyūdai Main Line|ja|久大本線}} at {{ill|Chikugo Yoshii Station|ja|筑後吉井駅}}, take a {{ill|taxi|ja|タクシー}} for about 7 minutes. | Spring Quality = {{ill|Simple Hot Springs|lt=Simple Hot Spring|ja|単純温泉}}, {{ill|Bicarbonate and Ferric Hydroxide Hot Spring|ja|炭酸水酸化鉄泉}} | Spring Temperature = 36 – 42°C | Flow Rate = | pH = | Classification of Liquid Nature = | Classification of Osmotic Pressure = | Number of Lodging Facilities = 3 | Total Capacity = | Annual Number of Bathers = | Statistical Year = | External Links = | Special Notes = }}
'''Yoshii Onsen''' (吉井温泉) is a {{ill|hot spring|ja|温泉}} located in {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|ja|福岡県}} {{ill|Ukiha City|ja|うきは市}} (formerly part of {{ill|Chikugo Province|ja|筑後国}}).
== Hot Spring Quality == * {{ill|Bicarbonate and Ferric Hydroxide Hot Spring|ja|炭酸水酸化鉄泉}} * {{ill|Simple Hot Springs|lt=Simple Hot Spring|ja|単純温泉}} ** {{ill|Source Temperature|ja|源泉温度}} 36–42°C
== Hot Spring Town == The hot spring town is located on the left bank of the {{ill|Chikugo River|ja|筑後川}}, where inns and day-use hot spring facilities can be found.<ref name="env">{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.env.go.jp/nature/onsen/area/pdf/hoyo_056.pdf|title=吉井温泉 国民保養温泉地計画書|website={{ill|Ministry of the Environment|ja|環境省}}|accessdate=2024-11-29}}</ref> On the opposite bank of the Chikugo River lies {{ill|Hara-Tsuru Onsen|ja|原鶴温泉}}.
Like Hara-Tsuru Onsen, the hot spring town is also renowned for its specialties in {{ill|cormorant fishing|ja|鵜飼い}} and {{ill|ayu|ja|鮎}} cuisine.
== History == The hot spring was first opened in {{ill|1956|ja|1956}}. It is said to have been discovered through a divine revelation, earning it the alternative name {{ill|Kami no Se Onsen|ja|神の瀬温泉}}.
Twelve years later, on November 19, 1968 (Showa 43), by notification No. 451 issued by the {{ill|Ministry of Health and Welfare|ja|厚生労働省|lt=Ministry of Health and Welfare}}, it was designated as a {{ill|National Public Resort Hot Spring Area|ja|国民保養温泉地}}.
== Access == * Rail: About 7 minutes by {{ill|taxi|ja|タクシー}} from {{ill|Chikugo Yoshii Station|ja|筑後吉井駅}} on the {{ill|Kyūdai Main Line|ja|久大本線}}.
== References == {{Reflist}}
== External Links == * [http://www.kttnet.co.jp/kurume-koiki/html/kanko/html/kanko0602.htm Kurume Broad Area Municipal Association Tourism Information [Hot Springs & Lodging] – Yoshii Onsen] == History == The hot spring was first opened in {{ill|1956|ja|1956}}. It is said to have been discovered through a divine revelation, earning it the alternative name {{ill|Kami no Se Onsen|ja|神の瀬温泉}}.
Twelve years later, on November 19, 1968 (Showa 43), by notification No. 451 issued by the {{ill|Ministry of Health and Welfare|ja|厚生労働省|lt=Ministry of Health and Welfare}}, it was designated as a {{ill|National Public Resort Hot Spring Area|ja|国民保養温泉地}}.
== Access == * Rail: About 7 minutes by {{ill|taxi|ja|タクシー}} from {{ill|Chikugo Yoshii Station|ja|筑後吉井駅}} on the {{ill|Kyūdai Main Line|ja|久大本線}}.

{{Japanese Hot Spring | Name = Yoshii Onsen (吉井温泉) | image = Yoshii onsen.JPG | Comment = | Location = {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|ja|福岡県}} {{ill|Ukiha City|ja|うきは市}} | Access = Rail: From the {{ill|Kyūdai Main Line|ja|久大本線}} at {{ill|Chikugo Yoshii Station|ja|筑後吉井駅}}, take a {{ill|taxi|ja|タクシー}} for about 7 minutes. | Spring Quality = {{ill|Simple Hot Springs|lt=Simple Hot Spring|ja|単純温泉}}, {{ill|Bicarbonate and Ferric Hydroxide Hot Spring|ja|炭酸水酸化鉄泉}} | Spring Temperature = 36 – 42°C | Flow Rate = | pH = | Classification of Liquid Nature = | Classification of Osmotic Pressure = | Number of Lodging Facilities = 3 | Total Capacity = | Annual Number of Bathers = | Statistical Year = | External Links = | Special Notes = }}
'''Yoshii Onsen''' (吉井温泉) is a {{ill|hot spring|ja|温泉}} located in {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|ja|福岡県}} {{ill|Ukiha City|ja|うきは市}} (formerly part of {{ill|Chikugo Province|ja|筑後国}}).
== Hot Spring Quality == * {{ill|Bicarbonate and Ferric Hydroxide Hot Spring|ja|炭酸水酸化鉄泉}} * {{ill|Simple Hot Springs|lt=Simple Hot Spring|ja|単純温泉}} ** {{ill|Source Temperature|ja|源泉温度}} 36–42°C
== Hot Spring Town == The hot spring town is located on the left bank of the {{ill|Chikugo River|ja|筑後川}}, where inns and day-use hot spring facilities can be found.<ref name="env">{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.env.go.jp/nature/onsen/area/pdf/hoyo_056.pdf|title=吉井温泉 国民保養温泉地計画書|website={{ill|Ministry of the Environment|ja|環境省}}|accessdate=2024-11-29}}</ref> On the opposite bank of the Chikugo River lies {{ill|Hara-Tsuru Onsen|ja|原鶴温泉}}.
Like Hara-Tsuru Onsen, the hot spring town is also renowned for its specialties in {{ill|cormorant fishing|ja|鵜飼い}} and {{ill|ayu|ja|鮎}} cuisine.
== History == The hot spring was first opened in {{ill|1956|ja|1956}}. It is said to have been discovered through a divine revelation, earning it the alternative name {{ill|Kami no Se Onsen|ja|神の瀬温泉}}.
Twelve years later, on November 19, 1968 (Showa 43), by notification No. 451 issued by the {{ill|Ministry of Health and Welfare|ja|厚生労働省|lt=Ministry of Health and Welfare}}, it was designated as a {{ill|National Public Resort Hot Spring Area|ja|国民保養温泉地}}.
== Access == * Rail: About 7 minutes by {{ill|taxi|ja|タクシー}} from {{ill|Chikugo Yoshii Station|ja|筑後吉井駅}} on the {{ill|Kyūdai Main Line|ja|久大本線}}.

{{Japanese Hot Spring | Name = Yoshii Onsen (吉井温泉) | image = Yoshii onsen.JPG | Comment = | Location = {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|ja|福岡県}} {{ill|Ukiha City|ja|うきは市}} | Access = Rail: From the {{ill|Kyūdai Main Line|ja|久大本線}} at {{ill|Chikugo Yoshii Station|ja|筑後吉井駅}}, take a {{ill|taxi|ja|タクシー}} for about 7 minutes. | Spring Quality = {{ill|Simple Hot Springs|lt=Simple Hot Spring|ja|単純温泉}}, {{ill|Bicarbonate and Ferric Hydroxide Hot Spring|ja|炭酸水酸化鉄泉}} | Spring Temperature = 36 – 42°C | Flow Rate = | pH = | Classification of Liquid Nature = | Classification of Osmotic Pressure = | Number of Lodging Facilities = 3 | Total Capacity = | Annual Number of Bathers = | Statistical Year = | External Links = | Special Notes = }}
'''Yoshii Onsen''' (吉井温泉) is a {{ill|hot spring|ja|温泉}} located in {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|ja|福岡県}} {{ill|Ukiha City|ja|うきは市}} (formerly part of {{ill|Chikugo Province|ja|筑後国}}).
== Hot Spring Quality == * {{ill|Bicarbonate and Ferric Hydroxide Hot Spring|ja|炭酸水酸化鉄泉}} * {{ill|Simple Hot Springs|lt=Simple Hot Spring|ja|単純温泉}} ** {{ill|Source Temperature|ja|源泉温度}} 36–42°C
== Hot Spring Town == The hot spring town is located on the left bank of the {{ill|Chikugo River|ja|筑後川}}, where inns and day-use hot spring facilities can be found.<ref name="env">{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.env.go.jp/nature/onsen/area/pdf/hoyo_056.pdf|title=吉井温泉 国民保養温泉地計画書|website={{ill|Ministry of the Environment|ja|環境省}}|accessdate=2024-11-29}}</ref> On the opposite bank of the Chikugo River lies {{ill|Hara-Tsuru Onsen|ja|原鶴温泉}}.
Like Hara-Tsuru Onsen, the hot spring town is also renowned for its specialties in {{ill|cormorant fishing|ja|鵜飼い}} and {{ill|ayu|ja|鮎}} cuisine.
== History == The hot spring was first opened in {{ill|1956|ja|1956}}. It is said to have been discovered through a divine revelation, earning it the alternative name {{ill|Kami no Se Onsen|ja|神の瀬温泉}}.
Twelve years later, on November 19, 1968 (Showa 43), by notification No. 451 issued by the {{ill|Ministry of Health and Welfare|ja|厚生労働省|lt=Ministry of Health and Welfare}}, it was designated as a {{ill|National Public Resort Hot Spring Area|ja|国民保養温泉地}}.
== Access == * Rail: About 7 minutes by {{ill|taxi|ja|タクシー}} from {{ill|Chikugo Yoshii Station|ja|筑後吉井駅}} on the {{ill|Kyūdai Main Line|ja|久大本線}}.
== References == {{Reflist}}

'''Yoshii Onsen''' (吉井温泉) is a {{ill|hot spring|ja|温泉}} located in {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|ja|福岡県}} {{ill|Ukiha City|ja|うきは市}} (formerly part of {{ill|Chikugo Province|ja|筑後国}}).
== Hot Spring Quality == * {{ill|Bicarbonate and Ferric Hydroxide Hot Spring|ja|炭酸水酸化鉄泉}} * {{ill|Simple Hot Springs|lt=Simple Hot Spring|ja|単純温泉|1=Simple Hot Springs}} ** {{ill|Source Temperature|ja|源泉温度}} 36–42°C
== Hot Spring Town == The hot spring town is located on the left bank of the {{ill|Chikugo River|ja|筑後川}}, where inns and day-use hot spring facilities can be found.<ref name="env">{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.env.go.jp/nature/onsen/area/pdf/hoyo_056.pdf|title=吉井温泉 国民保養温泉地計画書|website={{ill|Ministry of the Environment|ja|環境省}}|accessdate=2024-11-29}}</ref> On the opposite bank of the Chikugo River lies {{ill|Hara-Tsuru Onsen|ja|原鶴温泉}}.
Like Hara-Tsuru Onsen, the hot spring town is also renowned for its specialties in {{ill|cormorant fishing|ja|鵜飼い}} and {{ill|ayu|ja|鮎}} cuisine.
== History == The hot spring was first opened in {{ill|1956|ja|1956}}. It is said to have been discovered through a divine revelation, earning it the alternative name {{ill|Kami no Se Onsen|ja|神の瀬温泉}}.
Twelve years later, on November 19, 1968 (Showa 43), by notification No. 451 issued by the {{ill|Ministry of Health and Welfare|ja|厚生労働省|lt=Ministry of Health and Welfare}}, it was designated as a {{ill|National Public Resort Hot Spring Area|ja|国民保養温泉地}}.

{{Japanese Hot Spring | Name = Yoshii Onsen (吉井温泉) | image = Yoshii onsen.JPG | Comment = | Location = {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|ja|福岡県}} {{ill|Ukiha City|ja|うきは市}} | Access = Rail: From the {{ill|Kyūdai Main Line|ja|久大本線}} at {{ill|Chikugo Yoshii Station|ja|筑後吉井駅}}, take a {{ill|taxi|ja|タクシー}} for about 7 minutes. | Spring Quality = {{ill|Simple Hot Springs|lt=Simple Hot Spring|ja|単純温泉|1=Simple Hot Springs}}, {{ill|Bicarbonate and Ferric Hydroxide Hot Spring|ja|炭酸水酸化鉄泉}} | Spring Temperature = 36 – 42°C | Flow Rate = | pH = | Classification of Liquid Nature = | Classification of Osmotic Pressure = | Number of Lodging Facilities = 3 | Total Capacity = | Annual Number of Bathers = | Statistical Year = | External Links = | Special Notes = }}
'''Yoshii Onsen''' (吉井温泉) is a {{ill|hot spring|ja|温泉}} located in {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|ja|福岡県}} {{ill|Ukiha City|ja|うきは市}} (formerly part of {{ill|Chikugo Province|ja|筑後国}}).
== Hot Spring Quality == * {{ill|Bicarbonate and Ferric Hydroxide Hot Spring|ja|炭酸水酸化鉄泉}} * {{ill|Simple Hot Springs|lt=Simple Hot Spring|ja|単純温泉|1=Simple Hot Springs}} ** {{ill|Source Temperature|ja|源泉温度}} 36–42°C
== Hot Spring Town == The hot spring town is located on the left bank of the {{ill|Chikugo River|ja|筑後川}}, where inns and day-use hot spring facilities can be found.<ref name="env">{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.env.go.jp/nature/onsen/area/pdf/hoyo_056.pdf|title=吉井温泉 国民保養温泉地計画書|website={{ill|Ministry of the Environment|ja|環境省}}|accessdate=2024-11-29}}</ref> On the opposite bank of the Chikugo River lies {{ill|Hara-Tsuru Onsen|ja|原鶴温泉}}.
Like Hara-Tsuru Onsen, the hot spring town is also renowned for its specialties in {{ill|cormorant fishing|ja|鵜飼い}} and {{ill|ayu|ja|鮎}} cuisine.
== History == The hot spring was first opened in {{ill|1956|ja|1956}}. It is said to have been discovered through a divine revelation, earning it the alternative name {{ill|Kami no Se Onsen|ja|神の瀬温泉}}.
Twelve years later, on November 19, 1968 (Showa 43), by notification No. 451 issued by the {{ill|Ministry of Health and Welfare|ja|厚生労働省|lt=Ministry of Health and Welfare}}, it was designated as a {{ill|National Public Resort Hot Spring Area|ja|国民保養温泉地}}.
== Access == * Rail: About 7 minutes by {{ill|taxi|ja|タクシー}} from {{ill|Chikugo Yoshii Station|ja|筑後吉井駅}} on the {{ill|Kyūdai Main Line|ja|久大本線}}.
== References == {{Reflist}}

{{infobox Onsen | Name = Yoshii Onsen (吉井温泉) | image = Yoshii onsen.JPG | Comment = | Location = {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|ja|福岡県}} {{ill|Ukiha City|ja|うきは市}} | Access = Rail: From the {{ill|Kyūdai Main Line|ja|久大本線}} at {{ill|Chikugo Yoshii Station|ja|筑後吉井駅}}, take a {{ill|taxi|ja|タクシー}} for about 7 minutes. | Spring Quality = {{ill|Simple Hot Springs|lt=Simple Hot Spring|ja|単純温泉|1=Simple Hot Springs}}, {{ill|Bicarbonate and Ferric Hydroxide Hot Spring|ja|炭酸水酸化鉄泉}} | Spring Temperature = 36 – 42°C | Flow Rate = | pH = | Classification of Liquid Nature = | Classification of Osmotic Pressure = | Number of Lodging Facilities = 3 | Total Capacity = | Annual Number of Bathers = | Statistical Year = | External Links = | Special Notes = }}
'''Yoshii Onsen''' (吉井温泉) is a {{ill|hot spring|ja|温泉}} located in {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|ja|福岡県}} {{ill|Ukiha City|ja|うきは市}} (formerly part of {{ill|Chikugo Province|ja|筑後国}}).
== Hot Spring Quality == * {{ill|Bicarbonate and Ferric Hydroxide Hot Spring|ja|炭酸水酸化鉄泉}} * {{ill|Simple Hot Springs|lt=Simple Hot Spring|ja|単純温泉|1=Simple Hot Springs}} ** {{ill|Source Temperature|ja|源泉温度}} 36–42°C
== Hot Spring Town == The hot spring town is located on the left bank of the {{ill|Chikugo River|ja|筑後川}}, where inns and day-use hot spring facilities can be found.<ref name="env">{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.env.go.jp/nature/onsen/area/pdf/hoyo_056.pdf|title=吉井温泉 国民保養温泉地計画書|website={{ill|Ministry of the Environment|ja|環境省}}|accessdate=2024-11-29}}</ref> On the opposite bank of the Chikugo River lies {{ill|Hara-Tsuru Onsen|ja|原鶴温泉}}.
Like Hara-Tsuru Onsen, the hot spring town is also renowned for its specialties in {{ill|cormorant fishing|ja|鵜飼い}} and {{ill|ayu|ja|鮎}} cuisine.
== History == The hot spring was first opened in {{ill|1956|ja|1956}}. It is said to have been discovered through a divine revelation, earning it the alternative name {{ill|Kami no Se Onsen|ja|神の瀬温泉}}.
Twelve years later, on November 19, 1968 (Showa 43), by notification No. 451 issued by the {{ill|Ministry of Health and Welfare|ja|厚生労働省|lt=Ministry of Health and Welfare}}, it was designated as a {{ill|National Public Resort Hot Spring Area|ja|国民保養温泉地}}.
== Access == * Rail: About 7 minutes by {{ill|taxi|ja|タクシー}} from {{ill|Chikugo Yoshii Station|ja|筑後吉井駅}} on the {{ill|Kyūdai Main Line|ja|久大本線}}.
== References == {{Reflist}}
== External Links == * [http://www.kttnet.co.jp/kurume-koiki/html/kanko/html/kanko0602.htm Kurume Broad Area Municipal Association Tourism Information [Hot Springs & Lodging] – Yoshii Onsen] [[Category:Hot Springs in Fukuoka Prefecture]] [[Category:National Public Resort Hot Spring Areas]] [[Category:Geography of Ukiha City]] [[Category:11]]

revision.text:
{{infobox Onsen | Name = Yoshii Onsen (吉井温泉) | image = Yoshii onsen.JPG | Comment = | Location = {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|ja|福岡県}} {{ill|Ukiha City|ja|うきは市}} | Access = Rail: From the {{ill|Kyūdai Main Line|ja|久大本線}} at {{ill|Chikugo Yoshii Station|ja|筑後吉井駅}}, take a {{ill|taxi|ja|タクシー}} for about 7 minutes. | Spring Quality = {{ill|Simple Hot Springs|lt=Simple Hot Spring|ja|単純温泉|1=Simple Hot Springs}}, {{ill|Bicarbonate and Ferric Hydroxide Hot Spring|ja|炭酸水酸化鉄泉}} | Spring Temperature = 36 – 42°C | Flow Rate = | pH = | Classification of Liquid Nature = | Classification of Osmotic Pressure = | Number of Lodging Facilities = 3 | Total Capacity = | Annual Number of Bathers = | Statistical Year = | External Links = | Special Notes = }}
'''Yoshii Onsen''' (吉井温泉) is a {{ill|hot spring|ja|温泉}} located in {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|ja|福岡県}} {{ill|Ukiha City|ja|うきは市}} (formerly part of {{ill|Chikugo Province|ja|筑後国}}).
== Hot Spring Quality == * {{ill|Bicarbonate and Ferric Hydroxide Hot Spring|ja|炭酸水酸化鉄泉}} * {{ill|Simple Hot Springs|lt=Simple Hot Spring|ja|単純温泉|1=Simple Hot Springs}} ** {{ill|Source Temperature|ja|源泉温度}} 36–42°C
== Hot Spring Town == The hot spring town is located on the left bank of the {{ill|Chikugo River|ja|筑後川}}, where inns and day-use hot spring facilities can be found.<ref name="env">{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.env.go.jp/nature/onsen/area/pdf/hoyo_056.pdf|title=吉井温泉 国民保養温泉地計画書|website={{ill|Ministry of the Environment|ja|環境省}}|accessdate=2024-11-29}}</ref> On the opposite bank of the Chikugo River lies {{ill|Hara-Tsuru Onsen|ja|原鶴温泉}}.
Like Hara-Tsuru Onsen, the hot spring town is also renowned for its specialties in {{ill|cormorant fishing|ja|鵜飼い}} and {{ill|ayu|ja|鮎}} cuisine.
== History == The hot spring was first opened in {{ill|1956|ja|1956}}. It is said to have been discovered through a divine revelation, earning it the alternative name {{ill|Kami no Se Onsen|ja|神の瀬温泉}}.
Twelve years later, on November 19, 1968 (Showa 43), by notification No. 451 issued by the {{ill|Ministry of Health and Welfare|ja|厚生労働省|lt=Ministry of Health and Welfare}}, it was designated as a {{ill|National Public Resort Hot Spring Area|ja|国民保養温泉地}}.
== Access == * Rail: About 7 minutes by {{ill|taxi|ja|タクシー}} from {{ill|Chikugo Yoshii Station|ja|筑後吉井駅}} on the {{ill|Kyūdai Main Line|ja|久大本線}}.
== References == {{Reflist}}
== External Links == * [http://www.kttnet.co.jp/kurume-koiki/html/kanko/html/kanko0602.htm Kurume Broad Area Municipal Association Tourism Information [Hot Springs & Lodging] – Yoshii Onsen] [[Category:Hot Springs in Fukuoka Prefecture]] [[Category:National Public Resort Hot Spring Areas]] [[Category:Geography of Ukiha City]] [[Category:11]]

== Hot Spring Town == The hot spring town is located on the left bank of the {{ill|Chikugo River|ja|筑後川}}, where inns and day-use hot spring facilities can be found.<ref name="env">{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.env.go.jp/nature/onsen/area/pdf/hoyo_056.pdf|title=吉井温泉 国民保養温泉地計画書|website={{ill|Ministry of the Environment|ja|環境省}}|accessdate=2024-11-29}}</ref> On the opposite bank of the Chikugo River lies {{ill|Hara-Tsuru Onsen|ja|原鶴温泉}}.
Like Hara-Tsuru Onsen, the hot spring town is also renowned for its specialties in {{ill|cormorant fishing|ja|鵜飼い}} and {{ill|ayu|ja|鮎}} cuisine.
== History == The hot spring was first opened in {{ill|1956|ja|1956}}. It is said to have been discovered through a divine revelation, earning it the alternative name {{ill|Kami no Se Onsen|ja|神の瀬温泉}}.
Twelve years later, on November 19, 1968 (Showa 43), by notification No. 451 issued by the {{ill|Ministry of Health and Welfare|ja|厚生労働省|lt=Ministry of Health and Welfare}}, it was designated as a {{ill|National Public Resort Hot Spring Area|ja|国民保養温泉地}}.
== Access == * Rail: About 7 minutes by {{ill|taxi|ja|タクシー}} from {{ill|Chikugo Yoshii Station|ja|筑後吉井駅}} on the {{ill|Kyūdai Main Line|ja|久大本線}}.
== References == {{Reflist}}
== External Links == * [http://www.kttnet.co.jp/kurume-koiki/html/kanko/html/kanko0602.htm Kurume Broad Area Municipal Association Tourism Information [Hot Springs & Lodging] – Yoshii Onsen]

== Hot Spring Town == The hot spring town is located on the left bank of the {{ill|Chikugo River|ja|筑後川|12=draft}}, where inns and day-use hot spring facilities can be found.<ref name="env">{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.env.go.jp/nature/onsen/area/pdf/hoyo_056.pdf|title=吉井温泉 国民保養温泉地計画書|website={{ill|Ministry of the Environment|ja|環境省|12=draft}}|accessdate=2024-11-29}}</ref> On the opposite bank of the Chikugo River lies {{ill|Hara-Tsuru Onsen|ja|原鶴温泉|12=draft}}.

Twelve years later, on November 19, 1968 (Showa 43), by notification No. 451 issued by the {{ill|Ministry of Health and Welfare|ja|厚生労働省|lt=Ministry of Health and Welfare|12=draft}}, it was designated as a {{ill|National Public Resort Hot Spring Area|ja|国民保養温泉地|12=draft}}.
== Access == * Rail: About 7 minutes by {{ill|taxi|ja|タクシー|12=draft}} from {{ill|Chikugo Yoshii Station|ja|筑後吉井駅|12=draft}} on the {{ill|Kyūdai Main Line|ja|久大本線|12=draft}}.

revision.text:
{{日本の温泉地 |名称 = 吉井温泉 |画像 = Yoshii onsen.JPG |コメント = |所在地 = [[福岡県]][[うきは市]] |交通アクセス = 鉄道 : [[久大本線]][[筑後吉井駅]]より[[タクシー]]で約7分 |泉質 = [[単純温泉]]、炭酸水酸化鉄泉 |泉温 = 36 - 42 |湧出量 = |pH = |液性の分類 = |浸透圧の分類 = |宿泊施設数 = 3 |総収容人員数 = |年間浴客数 = |統計年度 = |外部リンク = |特記事項 = }} '''吉井温泉'''（よしいおんせん）は、[[福岡県]][[うきは市]]（旧国[[筑後国]]）にある[[温泉]]。
== 泉質 == * 炭酸水酸化鉄泉 * 単純温泉 ** [[源泉]][[温度]]36〜42℃
== 温泉街 == [[筑後川]]の左岸に位置しており、旅館や日帰り温泉施設が存在する<ref name="env">{{Cite web|和書|url =https://www.env.go.jp/nature/onsen/area/pdf/hoyo_056.pdf|title = 吉井温泉 国民保養温泉地計画書|website =環境省 |accessdate = 2024-11-29}}</ref>。筑後川の対岸には[[原鶴温泉]]がある。
対岸原鶴温泉同様、[[鵜飼い]]ならびに[[アユ|鮎]]料理が温泉街の名物となっている。
== 歴史 == 開湯は[[1956年]]である<ref name="env" />。神のお告げにより温泉を発見したとされ、「神の瀬温泉」の異名も持つ。
開湯から12年後の[[1968年|昭和43年]][[11月19日]] - [[厚生労働省|厚生省]]告示第451号により、[[国民保養温泉地]]に指定。
== アクセス == * 鉄道 : [[久大本線]][[筑後吉井駅]]より[[タクシー]]で約7分。
== 脚注 == {{Reflist}}
== 外部リンク == * [http://www.kttnet.co.jp/kurume-koiki/html/kanko/html/kanko0602.htm 久留米広域市町村圏事務組合 観光情報【温泉・宿泊】吉井温泉]
{{温泉}} {{Onsen-stub}}
{{DEFAULTSORT:よしいおんせん}} [[Category:福岡県の温泉]] [[Category:国民保養温泉地]] [[Category:うきは市の地理]]

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:吉井温泉 (福岡県)]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11412598]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:33, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Onsen | Name = Yoshii Onsen (吉井温泉) | image = Yoshii onsen.JPG | Comment = | Location = [[:en:Fukuoka Prefecture|Fukuoka Prefecture]] [[:en:Ukiha, Fukuoka|Ukiha City]] | Access = Rail: From the [[:en:Kyūdai Main Line|Kyūdai Main Line]] at [[:en:Chikugo-Yoshii Station|Chikugo Yoshii Station]], take a [[:en:Taxi|taxi]] for about 7 minutes. | Spring Quality = {{ill|Simple Hot Springs|lt=Simple Hot Spring|ja|単純温泉|1=Simple Hot Springs|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Simple Hot Springs|13=User:Immanuelle/Simple Hot Springs|qq=}}, {{ill|Bicarbonate and Ferric Hydroxide Hot Spring|ja|炭酸水酸化鉄泉|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bicarbonate and Ferric Hydroxide Hot Spring|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | Spring Temperature = 36 – 42°C | Flow Rate = | pH = | Classification of Liquid Nature = | Classification of Osmotic Pressure = | Number of Lodging Facilities = 3 | Total Capacity = | Annual Number of Bathers = | Statistical Year = | External Links = | Special Notes = }}
'''Yoshii Onsen''' (吉井温泉) is a [[:en:Onsen|Onsen]] located in [[:en:Fukuoka Prefecture|Fukuoka Prefecture]] [[:en:Ukiha, Fukuoka|Ukiha City]] (formerly part of [[:en:Chikugo Province|Chikugo Province]]).
== Hot Spring Quality == * {{ill|Bicarbonate and Ferric Hydroxide Hot Spring|ja|炭酸水酸化鉄泉|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bicarbonate and Ferric Hydroxide Hot Spring|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Simple Hot Springs|lt=Simple Hot Spring|ja|単純温泉|1=Simple Hot Springs|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Simple Hot Springs|13=User:Immanuelle/Simple Hot Springs|qq=}} ** {{ill|Source Temperature|ja|源泉温度|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Source Temperature|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 36–42°C
== Hot Spring Town == The hot spring town is located on the left bank of the [[:en:Chikugo River|Chikugo River]], where inns and day-use hot spring facilities can be found.<ref name="env">{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.env.go.jp/nature/onsen/area/pdf/hoyo_056.pdf|title=吉井温泉 国民保養温泉地計画書|website=[[:en:Ministry of the Environment (Japan)|Ministry of the Environment]]|accessdate=2024-11-29}}</ref> On the opposite bank of the Chikugo River lies {{ill|Hara-Tsuru Onsen|ja|原鶴温泉|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hara-Tsuru Onsen|qq=|1=Harazuru Onsen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11410091}}.
Like Hara-Tsuru Onsen, the hot spring town is also renowned for its specialties in [[:en:Cormorant fishing|cormorant fishing]] and {{ill|ayu|ja|鮎|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/ayu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アユ|1=Plecoglossus altivelis|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q642906}} cuisine.
== History == The hot spring was first opened in [[:en:1956|1956]]. It is said to have been discovered through a divine revelation, earning it the alternative name {{ill|Kami no Se Onsen|ja|神の瀬温泉|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kami no Se Onsen|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
Twelve years later, on November 19, 1968 (Showa 43), by notification No. 451 issued by the [[:en:Ministry of Health, Labour and Welfare|Ministry of Health and Welfare]], it was designated as a {{ill|National Public Resort Hot Spring Area|ja|国民保養温泉地|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/National Public Resort Hot Spring Area|qq=|1=National Hot Spring Resort Areas|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11421080}}.
== Access == * Rail: About 7 minutes by [[:en:Taxi|taxi]] from [[:en:Chikugo-Yoshii Station|Chikugo Yoshii Station]] on the [[:en:Kyūdai Main Line|Kyūdai Main Line]].
== References == {{Reflist}}
== External Links == * [http://www.kttnet.co.jp/kurume-koiki/html/kanko/html/kanko0602.htm Kurume Broad Area Municipal Association Tourism Information [Hot Springs & Lodging] – Yoshii Onsen] '''''' '''''' ''''''
{{Onsen}}

revision.comment: Bot: Add Wikidata has short description - based on Wikidata English short description
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:吉井温泉 (福岡県)]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11412598]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:33, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Onsen | Name = Yoshii Onsen (吉井温泉) | image = Yoshii onsen.JPG | Comment = | Location = [[:en:Fukuoka Prefecture|Fukuoka Prefecture]] [[:en:Ukiha, Fukuoka|Ukiha City]] | Access = Rail: From the [[:en:Kyūdai Main Line|Kyūdai Main Line]] at [[:en:Chikugo-Yoshii Station|Chikugo Yoshii Station]], take a [[:en:Taxi|taxi]] for about 7 minutes. | Spring Quality = {{ill|Simple Hot Springs|lt=Simple Hot Spring|ja|単純温泉|1=Simple Hot Springs|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Simple Hot Springs|13=User:Immanuelle/Simple Hot Springs|qq=}}, {{ill|Bicarbonate and Ferric Hydroxide Hot Spring|ja|炭酸水酸化鉄泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bicarbonate and Ferric Hydroxide Hot Spring|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | Spring Temperature = 36 – 42°C | Flow Rate = | pH = | Classification of Liquid Nature = | Classification of Osmotic Pressure = | Number of Lodging Facilities = 3 | Total Capacity = | Annual Number of Bathers = | Statistical Year = | External Links = | Special Notes = }}
'''Yoshii Onsen''' (吉井温泉) is a [[:en:Onsen|Onsen]] located in [[:en:Fukuoka Prefecture|Fukuoka Prefecture]] [[:en:Ukiha, Fukuoka|Ukiha City]] (formerly part of [[:en:Chikugo Province|Chikugo Province]]).
== Hot Spring Quality == * {{ill|Bicarbonate and Ferric Hydroxide Hot Spring|ja|炭酸水酸化鉄泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bicarbonate and Ferric Hydroxide Hot Spring|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Simple Hot Springs|lt=Simple Hot Spring|ja|単純温泉|1=Simple Hot Springs|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Simple Hot Springs|13=User:Immanuelle/Simple Hot Springs|qq=}} ** {{ill|Source Temperature|ja|源泉温度|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Source Temperature|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 36–42°C
== Hot Spring Town == The hot spring town is located on the left bank of the [[:en:Chikugo River|Chikugo River]], where inns and day-use hot spring facilities can be found.<ref name="env">{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.env.go.jp/nature/onsen/area/pdf/hoyo_056.pdf|title=吉井温泉 国民保養温泉地計画書|website=[[:en:Ministry of the Environment (Japan)|Ministry of the Environment]]|accessdate=2024-11-29}}</ref> On the opposite bank of the Chikugo River lies {{ill|Hara-Tsuru Onsen|ja|原鶴温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hara-Tsuru Onsen|1=Harazuru Onsen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11410091}}.
Like Hara-Tsuru Onsen, the hot spring town is also renowned for its specialties in [[:en:Cormorant fishing|cormorant fishing]] and {{ill|ayu|ja|鮎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/ayu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アユ|1=Plecoglossus altivelis|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q642906}} cuisine.
== History == The hot spring was first opened in [[:en:1956|1956]]. It is said to have been discovered through a divine revelation, earning it the alternative name {{ill|Kami no Se Onsen|ja|神の瀬温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kami no Se Onsen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
Twelve years later, on November 19, 1968 (Showa 43), by notification No. 451 issued by the [[:en:Ministry of Health, Labour and Welfare|Ministry of Health and Welfare]], it was designated as a {{ill|National Public Resort Hot Spring Area|ja|国民保養温泉地|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/National Public Resort Hot Spring Area|1=National Hot Spring Resort Areas|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11421080}}.
== Access == * Rail: About 7 minutes by [[:en:Taxi|taxi]] from [[:en:Chikugo-Yoshii Station|Chikugo Yoshii Station]] on the [[:en:Kyūdai Main Line|Kyūdai Main Line]].
== References == {{Reflist}}
== External Links == * [http://www.kttnet.co.jp/kurume-koiki/html/kanko/html/kanko0602.htm Kurume Broad Area Municipal Association Tourism Information [Hot Springs & Lodging] – Yoshii Onsen] '''''' '''''' ''''''

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:吉井温泉 (福岡県)]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11412598]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:33, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Onsen | Name = Yoshii Onsen (吉井温泉) | image = Yoshii onsen.JPG | Comment = | Location = [[:en:Fukuoka Prefecture|Fukuoka Prefecture]] [[:en:Ukiha, Fukuoka|Ukiha City]] | Access = Rail: From the [[:en:Kyūdai Main Line|Kyūdai Main Line]] at [[:en:Chikugo-Yoshii Station|Chikugo Yoshii Station]], take a [[:en:Taxi|taxi]] for about 7 minutes. | Spring Quality = {{ill|Simple Hot Springs|lt=Simple Hot Spring|ja|単純温泉|1=Simple Hot Springs|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Simple Hot Springs|13=User:Immanuelle/Simple Hot Springs|qq=}}, {{ill|Bicarbonate and Ferric Hydroxide Hot Spring|ja|炭酸水酸化鉄泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bicarbonate and Ferric Hydroxide Hot Spring|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | Spring Temperature = 36 – 42°C | Flow Rate = | pH = | Classification of Liquid Nature = | Classification of Osmotic Pressure = | Number of Lodging Facilities = 3 | Total Capacity = | Annual Number of Bathers = | Statistical Year = | External Links = | Special Notes = }}
'''Yoshii Onsen''' (吉井温泉) is a [[:en:Onsen|Onsen]] located in [[:en:Fukuoka Prefecture|Fukuoka Prefecture]] [[:en:Ukiha, Fukuoka|Ukiha City]] (formerly part of [[:en:Chikugo Province|Chikugo Province]]).
== Hot Spring Quality == * {{ill|Bicarbonate and Ferric Hydroxide Hot Spring|ja|炭酸水酸化鉄泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bicarbonate and Ferric Hydroxide Hot Spring|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Simple Hot Springs|lt=Simple Hot Spring|ja|単純温泉|1=Simple Hot Springs|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Simple Hot Springs|13=User:Immanuelle/Simple Hot Springs|qq=}} ** {{ill|Source Temperature|ja|源泉温度|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Source Temperature|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 36–42°C
== Hot Spring Town == The hot spring town is located on the left bank of the [[:en:Chikugo River|Chikugo River]], where inns and day-use hot spring facilities can be found.<ref name="env">{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.env.go.jp/nature/onsen/area/pdf/hoyo_056.pdf|title=吉井温泉 国民保養温泉地計画書|website=[[:en:Ministry of the Environment (Japan)|Ministry of the Environment]]|accessdate=2024-11-29}}</ref> On the opposite bank of the Chikugo River lies {{ill|Hara-Tsuru Onsen|ja|原鶴温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hara-Tsuru Onsen|1=Harazuru Onsen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11410091}}.
Like Hara-Tsuru Onsen, the hot spring town is also renowned for its specialties in [[:en:Cormorant fishing|cormorant fishing]] and {{ill|ayu|ja|鮎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/ayu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アユ|1=Plecoglossus altivelis|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q642906}} cuisine.
== History == The hot spring was first opened in [[:en:1956|1956]]. It is said to have been discovered through a divine revelation, earning it the alternative name {{ill|Kami no Se Onsen|ja|神の瀬温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kami no Se Onsen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
Twelve years later, on November 19, 1968 (Showa 43), by notification No. 451 issued by the [[:en:Ministry of Health, Labour and Welfare|Ministry of Health and Welfare]], it was designated as a {{ill|National Public Resort Hot Spring Area|ja|国民保養温泉地|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/National Public Resort Hot Spring Area|1=National Hot Spring Resort Areas|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11421080}}.
== Access == * Rail: About 7 minutes by [[:en:Taxi|taxi]] from [[:en:Chikugo-Yoshii Station|Chikugo Yoshii Station]] on the [[:en:Kyūdai Main Line|Kyūdai Main Line]].
== References == {{Reflist}}
== External Links == * [http://www.kttnet.co.jp/kurume-koiki/html/kanko/html/kanko0602.htm Kurume Broad Area Municipal Association Tourism Information [Hot Springs & Lodging] – Yoshii Onsen] '''''' '''''' ''''''

== History == The hot spring was first opened in [[:en:1956|1956]]. It is said to have been discovered through a divine revelation, earning it the alternative name {{ill|Kami no Se Onsen|ja|神の瀬温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kami no Se Onsen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
Twelve years later, on November 19, 1968 (Showa 43), by notification No. 451 issued by the [[:en:Ministry of Health, Labour and Welfare|Ministry of Health and Welfare]], it was designated as a {{ill|National Public Resort Hot Spring Area|ja|国民保養温泉地|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/National Public Resort Hot Spring Area|1=National Hot Spring Resort Areas|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11421080}}.
== Access == * Rail: About 7 minutes by [[:en:Taxi|taxi]] from [[:en:Chikugo-Yoshii Station|Chikugo Yoshii Station]] on the [[:en:Kyūdai Main Line|Kyūdai Main Line]].

== Hot Spring Quality == * {{ill|Bicarbonate and Ferric Hydroxide Hot Spring|ja|炭酸水酸化鉄泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bicarbonate and Ferric Hydroxide Hot Spring|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Simple Hot Springs|lt=Simple Hot Spring|ja|単純温泉|1=Simple Hot Springs|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Simple Hot Springs|13=User:Immanuelle/Simple Hot Springs|qq=}} ** {{ill|Source Temperature|ja|源泉温度|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Source Temperature|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 36–42°C
== Hot Spring Town == The hot spring town is located on the left bank of the [[:en:Chikugo River|Chikugo River]], where inns and day-use hot spring facilities can be found.<ref name="env">{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.env.go.jp/nature/onsen/area/pdf/hoyo_056.pdf|title=吉井温泉 国民保養温泉地計画書|website=[[:en:Ministry of the Environment (Japan)|Ministry of the Environment]]|accessdate=2024-11-29}}</ref> On the opposite bank of the Chikugo River lies {{ill|Hara-Tsuru Onsen|ja|原鶴温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hara-Tsuru Onsen|1=Harazuru Onsen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11410091}}.
Like Hara-Tsuru Onsen, the hot spring town is also renowned for its specialties in [[:en:Cormorant fishing|cormorant fishing]] and {{ill|ayu|ja|鮎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/ayu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アユ|1=Plecoglossus altivelis|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q642906}} cuisine.
== History == The hot spring was first opened in [[:en:1956|1956]]. It is said to have been discovered through a divine revelation, earning it the alternative name {{ill|Kami no Se Onsen|ja|神の瀬温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kami no Se Onsen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
Twelve years later, on November 19, 1968 (Showa 43), by notification No. 451 issued by the [[:en:Ministry of Health, Labour and Welfare|Ministry of Health and Welfare]], it was designated as a {{ill|National Public Resort Hot Spring Area|ja|国民保養温泉地|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/National Public Resort Hot Spring Area|1=National Hot Spring Resort Areas|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11421080}}.
== Access == * Rail: About 7 minutes by [[:en:Taxi|taxi]] from [[:en:Chikugo-Yoshii Station|Chikugo Yoshii Station]] on the [[:en:Kyūdai Main Line|Kyūdai Main Line]].
== References == {{Reflist}}
== External Links == * [http://www.kttnet.co.jp/kurume-koiki/html/kanko/html/kanko0602.htm Kurume Broad Area Municipal Association Tourism Information [Hot Springs & Lodging] – Yoshii Onsen] '''''' '''''' ''''''
{{Onsen}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:吉井温泉 (福岡県)]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:吉井温泉 (福岡県)]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:吉井温泉 (福岡県)]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11412598]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:33, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Onsen | Name = Yoshii Onsen (吉井温泉) | image = Yoshii onsen.JPG | Comment = | Location = [[:en:Fukuoka Prefecture|Fukuoka Prefecture]] [[:en:Ukiha, Fukuoka|Ukiha City]] | Access = Rail: From the [[:en:Kyūdai Main Line|Kyūdai Main Line]] at [[:en:Chikugo-Yoshii Station|Chikugo Yoshii Station]], take a [[:en:Taxi|taxi]] for about 7 minutes. | Spring Quality = {{ill|Simple Hot Springs|lt=Simple Hot Spring|ja|単純温泉|1=Simple Hot Springs|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Simple Hot Springs|13=User:Immanuelle/Simple Hot Springs|qq=}}, {{ill|Bicarbonate and Ferric Hydroxide Hot Spring|ja|炭酸水酸化鉄泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bicarbonate and Ferric Hydroxide Hot Spring|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | Spring Temperature = 36 – 42°C | Flow Rate = | pH = | Classification of Liquid Nature = | Classification of Osmotic Pressure = | Number of Lodging Facilities = 3 | Total Capacity = | Annual Number of Bathers = | Statistical Year = | External Links = | Special Notes = }}
'''Yoshii Onsen''' (吉井温泉) is a [[:en:Onsen|Onsen]] located in [[:en:Fukuoka Prefecture|Fukuoka Prefecture]] [[:en:Ukiha, Fukuoka|Ukiha City]] (formerly part of [[:en:Chikugo Province|Chikugo Province]]).
== Hot Spring Quality == * {{ill|Bicarbonate and Ferric Hydroxide Hot Spring|ja|炭酸水酸化鉄泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bicarbonate and Ferric Hydroxide Hot Spring|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Simple Hot Springs|lt=Simple Hot Spring|ja|単純温泉|1=Simple Hot Springs|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Simple Hot Springs|13=User:Immanuelle/Simple Hot Springs|qq=}} ** {{ill|Source Temperature|ja|源泉温度|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Source Temperature|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 36–42°C
== Hot Spring Town == The hot spring town is located on the left bank of the [[:en:Chikugo River|Chikugo River]], where inns and day-use hot spring facilities can be found.<ref name="env">{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.env.go.jp/nature/onsen/area/pdf/hoyo_056.pdf|title=吉井温泉 国民保養温泉地計画書|website=[[:en:Ministry of the Environment (Japan)|Ministry of the Environment]]|accessdate=2024-11-29}}</ref> On the opposite bank of the Chikugo River lies {{ill|Hara-Tsuru Onsen|ja|原鶴温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hara-Tsuru Onsen|1=Harazuru Onsen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11410091}}.
Like Hara-Tsuru Onsen, the hot spring town is also renowned for its specialties in [[:en:Cormorant fishing|cormorant fishing]] and {{ill|ayu|ja|鮎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/ayu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アユ|1=Plecoglossus altivelis|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q642906}} cuisine.
== History == The hot spring was first opened in [[:en:1956|1956]]. It is said to have been discovered through a divine revelation, earning it the alternative name {{ill|Kami no Se Onsen|ja|神の瀬温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kami no Se Onsen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
Twelve years later, on November 19, 1968 (Showa 43), by notification No. 451 issued by the [[:en:Ministry of Health, Labour and Welfare|Ministry of Health and Welfare]], it was designated as a {{ill|National Public Resort Hot Spring Area|ja|国民保養温泉地|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/National Public Resort Hot Spring Area|1=National Hot Spring Resort Areas|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11421080}}.
== Access == * Rail: About 7 minutes by [[:en:Taxi|taxi]] from [[:en:Chikugo-Yoshii Station|Chikugo Yoshii Station]] on the [[:en:Kyūdai Main Line|Kyūdai Main Line]].
== References == {{Reflist}}
== External Links == * [http://www.kttnet.co.jp/kurume-koiki/html/kanko/html/kanko0602.htm Kurume Broad Area Municipal Association Tourism Information [Hot Springs & Lodging] – Yoshii Onsen] '''''' '''''' ''''''
{{Onsen}}

== Hot Spring Town == The hot spring town is located on the left bank of the {{ill|Chikugo River|en|Chikugo River|WD=Q954320|lt=Chikugo River}}, where inns and day-use hot spring facilities can be found.<ref name="env">{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.env.go.jp/nature/onsen/area/pdf/hoyo_056.pdf|title=吉井温泉 国民保養温泉地計画書|website={{ill|Ministry of the Environment (Japan)|en|Ministry of the Environment (Japan)|WD=Q1125558|lt=Ministry of the Environment}}|accessdate=2024-11-29}}</ref> On the opposite bank of the Chikugo River lies {{ill|Hara-Tsuru Onsen|ja|原鶴温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hara-Tsuru Onsen|1=Harazuru Onsen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11410091}}.
Like Hara-Tsuru Onsen, the hot spring town is also renowned for its specialties in {{ill|Cormorant fishing|en|Cormorant fishing|WD=Q1784476|lt=cormorant fishing}} and {{ill|ayu|ja|鮎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/ayu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アユ|1=Plecoglossus altivelis|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q642906}} cuisine.
== History == The hot spring was first opened in {{ill|1956|en|1956|WD=Q5221|lt=1956}}. It is said to have been discovered through a divine revelation, earning it the alternative name {{ill|Kami no Se Onsen|ja|神の瀬温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kami no Se Onsen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
Twelve years later, on November 19, 1968 (Showa 43), by notification No. 451 issued by the {{ill|Ministry of Health, Labour and Welfare|en|Ministry of Health, Labour and Welfare|WD=Q1191238|lt=Ministry of Health and Welfare}}, it was designated as a {{ill|National Public Resort Hot Spring Area|ja|国民保養温泉地|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/National Public Resort Hot Spring Area|1=National Hot Spring Resort Areas|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11421080}}.
== Access == * Rail: About 7 minutes by {{ill|Taxi|en|Taxi|WD=Q82650|lt=taxi}} from {{ill|Chikugo-Yoshii Station|en|Chikugo-Yoshii Station|WD=Q4844938|lt=Chikugo Yoshii Station}} on the {{ill|Kyūdai Main Line|en|Kyūdai Main Line|WD=Q870569|lt=Kyūdai Main Line}}.

'''Yoshii Onsen''' (吉井温泉) is a {{ill|Onsen|en|Onsen|WD=Q655311|lt=Onsen}} located in {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|en|Fukuoka Prefecture|WD=Q123258|lt=Fukuoka Prefecture}} {{ill|Ukiha, Fukuoka|en|Ukiha, Fukuoka|WD=Q850373|lt=Ukiha City}} (formerly part of {{ill|Chikugo Province|en|Chikugo Province|WD=Q864159|lt=Chikugo Province}}).
== Hot Spring Quality == * {{ill|Bicarbonate and Ferric Hydroxide Hot Spring|ja|炭酸水酸化鉄泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bicarbonate and Ferric Hydroxide Hot Spring|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Simple Hot Springs|lt=Simple Hot Spring|ja|単純温泉|1=Simple Hot Springs|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Simple Hot Springs|13=User:Immanuelle/Simple Hot Springs|qq=}} ** {{ill|Source Temperature|ja|源泉温度|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Source Temperature|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 36–42°C
== Hot Spring Town == The hot spring town is located on the left bank of the {{ill|Chikugo River|en|Chikugo River|WD=Q954320|lt=Chikugo River}}, where inns and day-use hot spring facilities can be found.<ref name="env">{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.env.go.jp/nature/onsen/area/pdf/hoyo_056.pdf|title=吉井温泉 国民保養温泉地計画書|website={{ill|Ministry of the Environment (Japan)|en|Ministry of the Environment (Japan)|WD=Q1125558|lt=Ministry of the Environment}}|accessdate=2024-11-29}}</ref> On the opposite bank of the Chikugo River lies {{ill|Hara-Tsuru Onsen|ja|原鶴温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hara-Tsuru Onsen|1=Harazuru Onsen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11410091}}.
Like Hara-Tsuru Onsen, the hot spring town is also renowned for its specialties in {{ill|Cormorant fishing|en|Cormorant fishing|WD=Q1784476|lt=cormorant fishing}} and {{ill|ayu|ja|鮎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/ayu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アユ|1=Plecoglossus altivelis|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q642906}} cuisine.
== History == The hot spring was first opened in {{ill|1956|en|1956|WD=Q5221|lt=1956}}. It is said to have been discovered through a divine revelation, earning it the alternative name {{ill|Kami no Se Onsen|ja|神の瀬温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kami no Se Onsen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
Twelve years later, on November 19, 1968 (Showa 43), by notification No. 451 issued by the {{ill|Ministry of Health, Labour and Welfare|en|Ministry of Health, Labour and Welfare|WD=Q1191238|lt=Ministry of Health and Welfare}}, it was designated as a {{ill|National Public Resort Hot Spring Area|ja|国民保養温泉地|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/National Public Resort Hot Spring Area|1=National Hot Spring Resort Areas|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11421080}}.
== Access == * Rail: About 7 minutes by {{ill|Taxi|en|Taxi|WD=Q82650|lt=taxi}} from {{ill|Chikugo-Yoshii Station|en|Chikugo-Yoshii Station|WD=Q4844938|lt=Chikugo Yoshii Station}} on the {{ill|Kyūdai Main Line|en|Kyūdai Main Line|WD=Q870569|lt=Kyūdai Main Line}}.

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:吉井温泉 (福岡県)]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:吉井温泉 (福岡県)]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:吉井温泉 (福岡県)]]
{{infobox Onsen | Name = Yoshii Onsen (吉井温泉) | image = Yoshii onsen.JPG | Comment = | Location = {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|en|Fukuoka Prefecture|WD=Q123258|lt=Fukuoka Prefecture}} {{ill|Ukiha, Fukuoka|en|Ukiha, Fukuoka|WD=Q850373|lt=Ukiha City}} | Access = Rail: From the {{ill|Kyūdai Main Line|en|Kyūdai Main Line|WD=Q870569|lt=Kyūdai Main Line}} at {{ill|Chikugo-Yoshii Station|en|Chikugo-Yoshii Station|WD=Q4844938|lt=Chikugo Yoshii Station}}, take a {{ill|Taxi|en|Taxi|WD=Q82650|lt=taxi}} for about 7 minutes. | Spring Quality = {{ill|Simple Hot Springs|lt=Simple Hot Spring|ja|単純温泉|1=Simple Hot Springs|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Simple Hot Springs|13=User:Immanuelle/Simple Hot Springs|qq=}}, {{ill|Bicarbonate and Ferric Hydroxide Hot Spring|ja|炭酸水酸化鉄泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bicarbonate and Ferric Hydroxide Hot Spring|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | Spring Temperature = 36 – 42°C | Flow Rate = | pH = | Classification of Liquid Nature = | Classification of Osmotic Pressure = | Number of Lodging Facilities = 3 | Total Capacity = | Annual Number of Bathers = | Statistical Year = | External Links = | Special Notes = }}
'''Yoshii Onsen''' (吉井温泉) is a {{ill|Onsen|en|Onsen|WD=Q655311|lt=Onsen}} located in {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|en|Fukuoka Prefecture|WD=Q123258|lt=Fukuoka Prefecture}} {{ill|Ukiha, Fukuoka|en|Ukiha, Fukuoka|WD=Q850373|lt=Ukiha City}} (formerly part of {{ill|Chikugo Province|en|Chikugo Province|WD=Q864159|lt=Chikugo Province}}).
== Hot Spring Quality == * {{ill|Bicarbonate and Ferric Hydroxide Hot Spring|ja|炭酸水酸化鉄泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bicarbonate and Ferric Hydroxide Hot Spring|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Simple Hot Springs|lt=Simple Hot Spring|ja|単純温泉|1=Simple Hot Springs|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Simple Hot Springs|13=User:Immanuelle/Simple Hot Springs|qq=}} ** {{ill|Source Temperature|ja|源泉温度|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Source Temperature|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 36–42°C
== Hot Spring Town == The hot spring town is located on the left bank of the {{ill|Chikugo River|en|Chikugo River|WD=Q954320|lt=Chikugo River}}, where inns and day-use hot spring facilities can be found.<ref name="env">{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.env.go.jp/nature/onsen/area/pdf/hoyo_056.pdf|title=吉井温泉 国民保養温泉地計画書|website={{ill|Ministry of the Environment (Japan)|en|Ministry of the Environment (Japan)|WD=Q1125558|lt=Ministry of the Environment}}|accessdate=2024-11-29}}</ref> On the opposite bank of the Chikugo River lies {{ill|Hara-Tsuru Onsen|ja|原鶴温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hara-Tsuru Onsen|1=Harazuru Onsen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11410091}}.
Like Hara-Tsuru Onsen, the hot spring town is also renowned for its specialties in {{ill|Cormorant fishing|en|Cormorant fishing|WD=Q1784476|lt=cormorant fishing}} and {{ill|ayu|ja|鮎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/ayu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アユ|1=Plecoglossus altivelis|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q642906}} cuisine.
== History == The hot spring was first opened in {{ill|1956|en|1956|WD=Q5221|lt=1956}}. It is said to have been discovered through a divine revelation, earning it the alternative name {{ill|Kami no Se Onsen|ja|神の瀬温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kami no Se Onsen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
Twelve years later, on November 19, 1968 (Showa 43), by notification No. 451 issued by the {{ill|Ministry of Health, Labour and Welfare|en|Ministry of Health, Labour and Welfare|WD=Q1191238|lt=Ministry of Health and Welfare}}, it was designated as a {{ill|National Public Resort Hot Spring Area|ja|国民保養温泉地|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/National Public Resort Hot Spring Area|1=National Hot Spring Resort Areas|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11421080}}.
== Access == * Rail: About 7 minutes by {{ill|Taxi|en|Taxi|WD=Q82650|lt=taxi}} from {{ill|Chikugo-Yoshii Station|en|Chikugo-Yoshii Station|WD=Q4844938|lt=Chikugo Yoshii Station}} on the {{ill|Kyūdai Main Line|en|Kyūdai Main Line|WD=Q870569|lt=Kyūdai Main Line}}.
== References == {{Reflist}}
== External Links == * [http://www.kttnet.co.jp/kurume-koiki/html/kanko/html/kanko0602.htm Kurume Broad Area Municipal Association Tourism Information [Hot Springs & Lodging] – Yoshii Onsen] '''''' '''''' ''''''

Like Hara-Tsuru Onsen, the hot spring town is also renowned for its specialties in {{ill|Cormorant fishing|en|Cormorant fishing|WD=Q1784476|lt=cormorant fishing|1=Cormorant fishing}} and {{ill|ayu|ja|鮎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/ayu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アユ|1=Ayu sweetfish|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q642906}} cuisine.
== History == The hot spring was first opened in {{ill|1956|en|1956|WD=Q5221|lt=1956|1=1956}}. {{infobox Onsen | Name = Yoshii Onsen (吉井温泉) | image = Yoshii onsen.JPG | Comment = | Location = {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|en|Fukuoka Prefecture|WD=Q123258|lt=Fukuoka Prefecture|1=Fukuoka Prefecture}} {{ill|Ukiha, Fukuoka|en|Ukiha, Fukuoka|WD=Q850373|lt=Ukiha City|1=Ukiha, Fukuoka}} | Access = Rail: From the {{ill|Kyūdai Main Line|en|Kyūdai Main Line|WD=Q870569|lt=Kyūdai Main Line|1=Kyūdai Main Line}} at {{ill|Chikugo-Yoshii Station|en|Chikugo-Yoshii Station|WD=Q4844938|lt=Chikugo Yoshii Station|1=Chikugo-Yoshii Station}}, take a {{ill|Taxi|en|Taxi|WD=Q82650|lt=taxi|1=Taxi}} for about 7 minutes. | Spring Quality = {{ill|Simple Hot Springs|lt=Simple Hot Spring|ja|単純温泉|1=Simple Hot Springs|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Simple Hot Springs|13=User:Immanuelle/Simple Hot Springs|qq=}}, {{ill|Bicarbonate and Ferric Hydroxide Hot Spring|ja|炭酸水酸化鉄泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bicarbonate and Ferric Hydroxide Hot Spring|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | Spring Temperature = 36 – 42°C | Flow Rate = | pH = | Classification of Liquid Nature = | Classification of Osmotic Pressure = | Number of Lodging Facilities = 3 | Total Capacity = | Annual Number of Bathers = | Statistical Year = | External Links = | Special Notes = }}
'''Yoshii Onsen''' (吉井温泉) is a {{ill|Onsen|en|Onsen|WD=Q655311|lt=Onsen|1=Onsen}} located in {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|en|Fukuoka Prefecture|WD=Q123258|lt=Fukuoka Prefecture|1=Fukuoka Prefecture}} {{ill|Ukiha, Fukuoka|en|Ukiha, Fukuoka|WD=Q850373|lt=Ukiha City|1=Ukiha, Fukuoka}} (formerly part of {{ill|Chikugo Province|en|Chikugo Province|WD=Q864159|lt=Chikugo Province|1=Chikugo Province}}).
== Hot Spring Quality == * {{ill|Bicarbonate and Ferric Hydroxide Hot Spring|ja|炭酸水酸化鉄泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bicarbonate and Ferric Hydroxide Hot Spring|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Simple Hot Springs|lt=Simple Hot Spring|ja|単純温泉|1=Simple Hot Springs|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Simple Hot Springs|13=User:Immanuelle/Simple Hot Springs|qq=}} ** {{ill|Source Temperature|ja|源泉温度|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Source Temperature|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 36–42°C
== Hot Spring Town == The hot spring town is located on the left bank of the {{ill|Chikugo River|en|Chikugo River|WD=Q954320|lt=Chikugo River|1=Chikugo River}}, where inns and day-use hot spring facilities can be found.<ref name="env">{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.env.go.jp/nature/onsen/area/pdf/hoyo_056.pdf|title=吉井温泉 国民保養温泉地計画書|website={{ill|Ministry of the Environment (Japan)|en|Ministry of the Environment (Japan)|WD=Q1125558|lt=Ministry of the Environment|1=Ministry of the Environment (Japan)}}|accessdate=2024-11-29}}</ref> On the opposite bank of the Chikugo River lies {{ill|Hara-Tsuru Onsen|ja|原鶴温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hara-Tsuru Onsen|1=Harazuru Onsen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11410091}}.
Like Hara-Tsuru Onsen, the hot spring town is also renowned for its specialties in {{ill|Cormorant fishing|en|Cormorant fishing|WD=Q1784476|lt=cormorant fishing|1=Cormorant fishing}} and {{ill|ayu|ja|鮎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/ayu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アユ|1=Ayu sweetfish|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q642906}} cuisine.
== History == The hot spring was first opened in {{ill|1956|en|1956|WD=Q5221|lt=1956|1=1956}}. It is said to have been discovered through a divine revelation, earning it the alternative name {{ill|Kami no Se Onsen|ja|神の瀬温泉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kami no Se Onsen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
Twelve years later, on November 19, 1968 (Showa 43), by notification No. 451 issued by the {{ill|Ministry of Health, Labour and Welfare|en|Ministry of Health, Labour and Welfare|WD=Q1191238|lt=Ministry of Health and Welfare|1=Ministry of Health, Labour and Welfare}}, it was designated as a {{ill|National Public Resort Hot Spring Area|ja|国民保養温泉地|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/National Public Resort Hot Spring Area|1=National Hot Spring Resort Areas|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11421080}}.
== Access == * Rail: About 7 minutes by {{ill|Taxi|en|Taxi|WD=Q82650|lt=taxi|1=Taxi}} from {{ill|Chikugo-Yoshii Station|en|Chikugo-Yoshii Station|WD=Q4844938|lt=Chikugo Yoshii Station|1=Chikugo-Yoshii Station}} on the {{ill|Kyūdai Main Line|en|Kyūdai Main Line|WD=Q870569|lt=Kyūdai Main Line|1=Kyūdai Main Line}}.
